person.name: Beatrice HENGRAVE
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Beatrice was born about 1288. Beatrice passed away about 1336.

"Sir Robert de Thorpe married Beatrix, the daughter of Sir Edmund de Hengrave, and died at the close of A.D. 1330, leaving behind him three sons, John, Edmund, and Robert, the eldest of whom was only fifteen years of age."

Beatrice who married Sir Robert Thorp, was sister to Cecily, who married Hugh Barry.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice HENGRAVE於大約1288年出生在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆時，她的父親Edmund Hengrave36歲，母親Isabel de Calthorpe23歲。她和Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe至少有2個兒子。她去世於1336年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice HENGRAVE was born about 1288, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, her father, Edmund Hengrave, was 36 and her mother, Isabel de Calthorpe, was 23. She had at least 2 sons with Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe. She died in 1336, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice HENGRAVE(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Hengrave(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Calthorpe(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.
